title: NTA National Teachers Eligibility Test NTET 2026 Last Date Extended
description: NTA National Teachers Eligibility Test NTET 2026 Last Date Extended Latest Update: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has extended the last date for NTET 2026 Online Application Form. Earlier, the last date to apply was 02 April 2026, but now it is expected to be extended till 07 April 2026.
